'''sagugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyanoxalite|kyanoxalite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyanoxalite|kyanoxalite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sagugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sægigith|sægigith]] || [[word:sægigij|sægigij]] || [[word:sægigish|sægigish]] || [[word:sægigi|sægigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:saguguguth|saguguguth]] || [[word:saguguguj|saguguguj]] || [[word:sagugugush|sagugugush]] || [[word:sagugugu|sagugugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:saguguth|saguguth]] || [[word:saguguj|saguguj]] || [[word:sagugush|sagugush]] || [[word:sagugu|sagugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sagufguth|sagufguth]] || [[word:sagufguj|sagufguj]] || [[word:sagufgush|sagufgush]] || [[word:sagufguf|sagufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:saguguthu|saguguthu]] || [[word:saguguju|saguguju]] || [[word:sagugushu|sagugushu]] || [[word:saguguku|saguguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:saguguth|saguguth]] || [[word:saguguj|saguguj]] || [[word:sagugush|sagugush]] || [[word:sagugu|sagugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:saguguthul|saguguthul]] || [[word:sagugujul|sagugujul]] || [[word:sagugushul|sagugushul]] || [[word:sagugukul|sagugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:saguguthuthu|saguguthuthu]] || [[word:sagugujuju|sagugujuju]] || [[word:sagugushushu|sagugushushu]] || [[word:saguguku|saguguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:saguguthun|saguguthun]] || [[word:sagugujun|sagugujun]] || [[word:sagugushun|sagugushun]] || [[word:sagugukun|sagugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:saguguthuoro|saguguthuoro]] || [[word:sagugujuoro|sagugujuoro]] || [[word:sagugushuoro|sagugushuoro]] || [[word:sagugukuoro|sagugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
